caption: 3. Tabular Findings
rows:
Traffic increased after
grade release
notifications.

Scale read replicas
before scheduled
announcements.
markdown:
|Metric|Value|Notes|Severity|Action|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|Peak request window|7–8 PM|Traffic increased after grade release notifications.|Medium|Scale read replicas before scheduled announcements.|
|Highest&#45;latency endpoint|/api/payments|Payment callback introduced the largest tail latency.|High|Add timeout budget and async retry handling.|
|Most common error|401 Unauthorized|Typically triggered by expired mobile sessions.|Low|Prompt token refresh in client app.|
|Largest error spike|5:20 PM|Short 5xx burst lasted 11 minutes during deployment.|High|Stagger deploys and warm application instances.|
